summary: Pipeline Hero Card UI Clarity Improvements - Iteration 275. All features verified: max 3 bullets, deduplication, colored status dots (red/green/amber), en-dash preservation in number ranges. Both desktop and mobile viewports tested.
critical_code_review_comments: signal-format.js: parseSignals() correctly splits on em-dash (—) and semicolon (;) only, NOT en-dash (–) - VERIFIED
signal-format.js: dedupKey() and isSimilar() functions properly deduplicate similar phrases - VERIFIED
signal-format.js: dotColor() correctly assigns RED (#ff6b7f) for negative keywords, GREEN (#5ce0b8) for positive, AMBER (#ffb347) for neutral - VERIFIED
signal-format.js: Max 3 bullets enforced via unique.slice(0, 3) - VERIFIED
PipelineHero.js: Uses parseSignals() for reason text, renders colored dot bullets (lines 140-160) - VERIFIED
PriorityBoard.js: RecapMoveCard uses parseSignals() for reason text (lines 152-175) - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline Hero Card UI clarity improvements complete. signal-format.js utility handles: (1) splitting on em-dash/semicolon only, (2) deduplication via keyword overlap detection, (3) max 3 bullets, (4) colored dots based on sentiment keywords. En-dash ranges like '24–48 hours' are preserved. All navigation and toggle functionality working.

pipeline_page_loads.details: Pipeline page loads successfully after login, Priority view is default

hero_max_3_bullets.details: Exactly 3 bullets displayed: 'Overdue follow-up needs action', 'Coach responded', 'Momentum is building'

hero_deduplication.details: Deduplication working - similar phrases filtered out, only unique signals shown

hero_colored_dots.details: RED dot for 'Overdue follow-up needs action' (negative), GREEN dot for 'Coach responded' (positive), AMBER dot for 'Momentum is building' (neutral)

priority_board_bullets_with_dots.details: All attention cards show bullet format with colored dots. Example: Emory card shows RED dot for 'No activity for 14 days', AMBER for 'Re-engage within 24–48 hours'

en_dash_preservation.details: '24–48 hours' preserved as single bullet, en-dash (–) not split

attention_card_navigation.details: Clicking attention cards navigates to school detail page

mobile_viewport.details: Hero card renders properly at 390x844, all 3 bullets visible with colored dots, progress rail hidden (sm:flex)
